prompt_template:
Decompose into subtasks:
"The homepage loads slowly. Investigate causes and optimize to under 2 seconds."
Output JSON tree.

scoring.expected_tree: {"task": "Optimize homepage load time", "subtasks": [{"task": "Profile page load performance", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Identify slow queries", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Add database indexes", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Implement caching", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Optimize asset delivery", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Verify performance improvement", "subtasks": []}]}
